title: rubus × jordanninus
intro: Rubus × jordanninus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Jordan raspberry, is a rare and unique hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, Rubus × jordanninus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
